creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:

Log:
  MFH r502589:

  h2o{,-devel}: Improve rc.d/h2o, freshen h2o.conf

   - Add a configtest target
   - Fix a bug that could prevent the script from locating the PIDfile path

  h2o.conf:
   - Remove entries that are defaults
